name: codex-quota-float
description: Show official Codex quota in a compact Windows widget.

interface.shortDescription: Keep official Codex quota visible in a compact widget.
interface.longDescription: Codex Quota Float reads official Codex rate-limit snapshots without reading authentication files or task content. It displays remaining percentages in an always-on-top Windows widget, refreshes silently, remembers its position, and clearly labels cached fallback values.
defaultPrompt: Show my official remaining quota and reset time.
